files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Adapters.LdClientAdapter
files.Summary: Adapts an to the requirements of .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.AgentConfigRequest
files.Summary: Represents a single agent config request for use with .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiAgentConfig
files.Summary:
Represents an AI Agent Config returned by the SDK, containing model parameters, agent instructions, available tools, and a factory that produces a tracker for reporting events related to model usage.

Instances of this type are produced by the AI client's agent config method; they are not constructed directly by users. To supply a fallback default to the client, use .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiAgentConfigDefault.Builder
files.Summary: Builder for constructing an instance.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiAgentConfigDefault
files.Summary:
Represents a default AI Agent Config supplied by the user as a fallback to the AI client's agent config method. This type contains the same data fields as but has no tracker — it is purely an input to the client.

Construct an instance via and the nested , or use for a disabled default.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiCompletionConfig
files.Summary:
Represents an AI Completion Config returned by the SDK, containing model parameters, prompt messages, and a factory that produces a tracker for reporting events related to model usage.

Instances of this type are produced by ; they are not constructed directly by users. To supply a fallback default to the client, use .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiCompletionConfigDefault.Builder
files.Summary: Builder for constructing an LdAiCompletionConfigDefault instance, which can be passed as the default value to the AI Client's method.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiCompletionConfigDefault
files.Summary:
Represents a default AI Completion Config supplied by the user as a fallback to . This type contains the same data fields as but has no tracker — it is purely an input to the client.

Construct an instance via and the nested , or use for a disabled default.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfig
files.Summary: Shared type for AI Configs returned by the SDK. Carries common fields and the factory. Cannot be constructed or subclassed outside the SDK.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigDefault
files.Summary: Shared type for user-supplied default AI Configs. Carries the data fields common to the mode-specific default config types. Cannot be constructed or subclassed outside the SDK.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.JudgeConfiguration.Judge
files.Summary: Represents a single judge entry within a .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.JudgeConfiguration
files.Summary: Configuration for the judges associated with an AI Config.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.Message
files.Summary: Represents a single message, which is part of a prompt.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.ModelConfig
files.Summary: Information about the model.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.ProviderConfig
files.Summary: Information about the model provider.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.Role
files.Summary: Represents the role of the prompt message.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes.Tool
files.Summary: Represents a tool available to the model in agent mode.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiConfigTypes
files.Summary: Types that compose AI Config payloads returned or accepted by the SDK.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiJudgeConfig
files.Summary:
Represents an AI Judge Config returned by the SDK, containing model parameters, prompt messages, an evaluation metric key, and a factory that produces a tracker for reporting events related to model usage.

Instances of this type are produced by the AI client's judge config method; they are not constructed directly by users. To supply a fallback default to the client, use .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiJudgeConfigDefault.Builder
files.Summary: Builder for constructing an instance.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Config.LdAiJudgeConfigDefault
files.Summary:
Represents a default AI Judge Config supplied by the user as a fallback to the AI client's judge config method. This type contains the same data fields as but has no tracker — it is purely an input to the client.

Construct an instance via and the nested , or use for a disabled default.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.AgentGraphDefinition
files.Summary: Represents a fully-resolved agent graph returned by . When is false, all node collections are empty and traversal is a no-op; only and remain meaningful.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.AgentGraphFlagValue
files.Summary: Raw flag value for an agent graph configuration as returned by LaunchDarkly. Returned by .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.AgentGraphNode
files.Summary: Represents a single node within an agent graph. Each node wraps an and carries the outgoing edges to its children. Use the config's tracker (via Config.CreateTracker()) to record node-level metrics.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.AiGraphTrackData
files.Summary: Tracking metadata included in every graph tracker event.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.AiGraphTracker
files.Summary: Records metrics for a single agent graph invocation.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.GraphEdge
files.Summary: A directed edge in an agent graph, connecting a source node to a target node. The source is implicit — it is the node that owns this edge.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Graph.LdMeta
files.Summary: LaunchDarkly metadata from the _ldMeta field on flag values.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Interfaces.ILaunchDarklyClient
files.Summary: Interface representing capabilities needed by the AI Client. These are usually provided by the LaunchDarkly Server SDK.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Interfaces.ILdAiClient
files.Summary: Represents the interface of the AI client, useful for mocking.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Interfaces.ILdAiConfigTracker
files.Summary: Records metrics for a single AI run.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Interfaces.ILdAiGraphClient
files.Summary: Extension interface for agent graph operations. Implemented alongside by .

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Interfaces.ILogger
files.Summary: Log interface required by the AI Client.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.LdAiClient
files.Summary: The LaunchDarkly AI client. The client is capable of retrieving AI Configs and agent graphs from LaunchDarkly, and generating events specific to usage of those configs when interacting with model providers.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.LdAiConfigTracker
files.Summary: Records metrics for a single AI run.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.SdkInfo
files.Summary: Contains metadata about the AI SDK, such as its name, version, and implementation language.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.AiGraphMetricSummary
files.Summary: A summary of the metrics tracked by an AiGraphTracker during a graph invocation.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.AiMetrics
files.Summary: Holds the metrics extracted from an AI operation for use with ILdAiConfigTracker.TrackMetricsOf.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.Feedback
files.Summary: Feedback about the generated content.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.JudgeResult
files.Summary: Represents the result of a judge evaluation for use with ILdAiConfigTracker.TrackJudgeResult.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.MetricSummary
files.Summary: A summary of the metrics tracked by a tracker.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.Metrics
files.Summary: Represents metrics returned by a model provider.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.Response
files.Summary: Represents information returned by a model provider.

files.Title: LaunchDarkly.Sdk.Server.Ai.Tracking.Usage
files.Summary: Represents token usage.
